body:
## Summary
- Updated content validator mirrors for the current practice route selection contract, progress-store read/parse helpers, and practice session store fields.
- Changed the schema-drift regression test to assert that `validate:content` is green with the current release/schema contracts.

## Root cause
The validator was still checking older implementation snippets after the current app code moved practice selection to `sessionCompletedQuestionIds`, wrapped progress reads/parsing in recovery helpers, and added `startSession` to the practice session store contract.

## Validation
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/content-validator-schema-drift.test.js`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `git diff --check HEAD^..HEAD`
title: test: restore progress validator schema mirrors
